local.label: Clean Sheet Shield
local.effect: Activate the Clean Sheet Shield to gain an edge in any of the Knockout stages. Any goalkeeper, defender, or midfielder in your team will only lose their clean sheet after conceding 2 goals.
local.constraints: Official help page says this booster is revealed once Round 3 locks and Round of 32 opens, and can be used for one knockout-stage round including the Final.

live.desc_1: Your new booster is now ready to be used!
live.desc_2: Activate the Clean Sheet Shield to gain an edge in any of the Knockout stages. Any goalkeeper, defender, or midfielder in your team will only lose their clean sheet after conceding 2 goals.

reasons: Official fantasy player import fields changed.
Official rules, rounds, deadlines, or Clean Sheet Shield text changed.
